title: Spicy Crispy Tofu Stir-fry
description: A flavorful and crispy dish featuring fresh basil, perfect for post-workout meal recovery. This recipe is both spicy and fodmap-friendly.
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add chopped garlic and sauté until fragrant.
Add sliced Thai chili peppers to the pan, cook for about 30 seconds or until slightly softened.
Cut tofu into small cubes and add them to the pan, stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until golden brown.
Mix in fish sauce and Sriracha sauce. Stir gently to combine all ingredients evenly.
Add chopped basil leaves and stir well to coat the tofu thoroughly with the sauce.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
